candidates.why: The only visible D&A-related operating row is a generic 'Depreciation' line, but it has no reported values and is not identified as COGS/cost-of-sales related. There is no separate COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row shown alongside or outside the selected 'Cost of goods sold' bucket.

variables.notes: No separate operating D&A row should be added to COGS. The excerpt shows no explicit depreciation/amortisation line tied to cost of goods sold.

candidates.why: A generic 'Depreciation' row appears in the operating section, but it has no reported values. Also, 'Total costs' exactly equals Selling expenses + Administrative expenses + Development expenses, indicating the blank depreciation line is not a separate amount to add to the selected XSGA component bucket.

variables.notes: Do not add separate XSGA D&A. The visible 'Depreciation' line is blank, and the selected XSGA components already sum to 'Total costs' without any additional D&A line.
